forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 30 km/h later.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 25 km/h tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 25 km/h later.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower at night. Light winds.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon.
Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely later in the day. The chance of a thunderstorm later in the day. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely during the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly during the day.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 25 km/h tending southerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the morning then tending southeasterly during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning. Light winds becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending southwesterly during the day.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely during the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.
